description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image, set the GRADLE_OPTS variable to "-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false", and define a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to a .gradle directory in the repository. Enable a cache for the build and .gradle directories. Define three stages: build, test, and production. In the build stage add a gradle-build job that runs "gradle classes". In the test stage add a gradle-test job that runs "gradle check" and stores the build/reports and build/test-results directories as artifacts. In the production stage add gradle-doc and gradle-package jobs that run "gradle doc" and "gradle jar" respectively, each publishing their output directories (build/doc and build/libs) as artifacts.
